name: Rhubarb Sour Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix all ingredients except rhubarb in a bowl.
3. Stir in the chopped rhubarb.
4. Pour the filling into a 9-inch pie crust.
5. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 25 minutes.
6. Remove from oven, sprinkle crumb topping over the filling (see recipe below), and return to oven for another 15 minutes or until topping is brown.
Crumb Topping:
1/3 cup Sugar
1/3 cup Flour
1/2 teaspoon Salt
1/4 cup Butter (softened)
1 tablespoon Cinnamon
